attributes.description: Report of high-level indicators into an Elasticsearch cluster's overall health.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links for Elasticsearch report and summary dashboards
embeddableConfig.title: Elasticsearch

embeddableConfig.description: Quick shortcuts to the most frequently used dashboards.
embeddableConfig.title: Popular Dashboards

embeddableConfig.description: Estimated document ingestion rate, including replicas.
Estimated total bytes per day stored to indices, excluding replicas. Not representative of I/O as it does not include writes from segment merges.
Percent of disk utilization where 100% is full. Frozen nodes are still considered healthy at 90%+ utilization because of how the shared cache pre-reserves space.
Total documents in all indices in the cluster.
Total storage required for all indices searchable on the cluster. Includes partially-mounted (frozen) searchable snapshots; Excludes replicas and standard backup snapshots.

attributes.description: Total docs allocated to shards in local storage on nodes.

embeddableConfig.description: Total docs allocated to shards in local storage on nodes.

attributes.description: Total bytes used by indices on node-local storage. Includes partially-mounted searchable snapshots (cold); excludes partially-mounted searchable snapshots (frozen).

embeddableConfig.description: Total bytes used by indices on node-local storage. Includes fully-mounted searchable snapshots (cold); excludes partially-mounted searchable snapshots (frozen).
The normalized node CPU percent, where 100% is considered full load across all cores.

attributes.title: Elasticsearch Cluster Report
